description: A perfect lightweight backpack to carry to office or for MBA classes, this backpack from puma has ample space to hold your laptop along with its charger and other accessories. You can store your notebooks or other essentials in the additional chamber in the front, while the ergonomically constructed backstraps sit comfortably, keeping you safe from any nagging backache. Made of 70% polyester and 30%nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and durability One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a padded laptop compartment One additional zippered compartment on the front for enhanced space with utility pocket on the front with organizer pouch, mobile pouch and three pen holders puma rubber applique on the front Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not use detergent Remove wet items immediately
